doc.runtime: Linux executes the exact pinned, source-patched PCSX2 package from the AppImage asset root inside bubblewrap. No host executable, Flatpak runtime, or prebuilt Linux binary participates.
doc.state: PCSX2 2.6.3 reads $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/PCSX2; Semu maps that to the per-emulator state root. Settings, memory cards, save states, snapshots, cache, logs, and textures remain Semu-owned generated/runtime state.
doc.graphics: [EmuCore/GS] Renderer = 12 forces OpenGL in the generated profile. The direct ABI 2 hook runs after the final upright GS draw, then after PCSX2 UI immediately before the emulator-owned swap.
doc.firmware: The configured PS2 BIOS root is mounted read-only. ROM, BIOS, and external emulation roots are never writable from the PCSX2 sandbox.
doc.input: The packaged Game Mode process binds Pad1 to its first SDL gamepad, SDL-0. The profile compiler reads this Linux platform declaration directly; it does not inherit a stale host enumeration index.
doc.platforms: PCSX2 is intentionally Linux-only until a reproducible source-built Darwin slice exists. An upstream application archive is not a production fallback.
